name: PORTAL HYPERTENSION
definition: portal venous pressure > 10 mmHg increase in sinusoidal pressure ← deposition of collagen in spaces of Disse + splenic vein occlusion / superior mesenteric vein occlusion
distribution: SMV + splenic vein > 10 mm; coronary vein > 4 mm; recanalized umbilical vein > 3 mm
discriminating_features: hepatofugal venous flow (82% sensitive, 100% specific for portal hypertension)
splenomegaly (nonspecific; absence does NOT rule out portal hypertension)
SMV + splenic vein > 10 mm; coronary vein > 4 mm; recanalized umbilical vein > 3 mm
